fields.name: No. of Reminders
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number that indicates the reminder level.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the customer ledger entry that this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies an entry description, based on the contents of the Type field.

fields.name: Original Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the original amount of the customer ledger entry that this reminder line is for.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining amount of the customer ledger entry this reminder line is for.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount in the currency that is represented by the currency code on the reminder header.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT amount in the currency that is represented by the currency code on the reminder header.

fields.name: Line Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the reminder line.

fields.name: Applies-to Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.
